tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
tool_args.raw_text: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS. March 2026. mta.info. This performance metrics document was prepared for the March 2026 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area

tool_args.label: MTA Construction & Development
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development and the LIRR have reached Substantial Completion on the Hall Interlocking Expansion

tool_args.label: Rob Free, President, Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: Rob Free President, Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Justin Vonashek, President, Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Justin Vonashek President, Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee
tool_args.raw_text: This performance metrics document was prepared for the March 2026 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees. Members of the Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committee include: Marc Herbst, Co-Chair; Blanca Lopez, Co-Chair...

payload.entity_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee

tool_args.label: MTA Police Department
tool_args.raw_text: The number of assaults and harassments against LIRR employees recorded by MTA Police Department; The number of criminal summonses issued for fare evasion by MTA Police Department; MTAPD's Emergency Services Unit

tool_args.label: Hall Interlocking Expansion (Jamaica Capacity Improvements)
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development and the LIRR have reached Substantial Completion on the Hall Interlocking Expansion, a key component of the Jamaica Capacity Improvements (JCI) Program. The project extends existing yard layout Tracks 2 and 3, eventually creating two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station.

payload.description: Key component of the Jamaica Capacity Improvements (JCI) Program. Extends existing yard layout Tracks 2 and 3, creating two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station that will become Montauk Branch Tracks #1 and #2. Construction of a new 280-foot, two-track railroad bridge spanning 150th Street and Atlantic Branch Track #1.

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.

tool_args.label: Locust Manor Accessibility Improvements Project
tool_args.raw_text: The recently completed Locust Manor Accessibility Improvements Project...installation of two new elevators with enclosed vestibules...replaced platform rubbing edge boards and tactile strips...new sidewalks...stairs and ramps were also newly built or rehabilitated...ADA-compliant signage were installed.

payload.description: Installation of two new elevators with enclosed vestibules, replaced platform rubbing edge boards and tactile strips, new sidewalks, stairs and ramps built or rehabilitated, wayfinding and ADA-compliant signage installed at Locust Manor station.

tool_args.label: West 255th Street Reconstruction Project at Riverdale Station
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development is launching major improvements at and around Riverdale Station through the West 255th Street Reconstruction Project. The work will begin with West 255th Street, where crews will carry out a full reconstruction.

payload.description: Full reconstruction of West 255th Street, upgrading drainage system to reduce flooding, building a new retaining wall, reconstructing station parking lot in two phases. Delivered as a Design Bid Build contract through a third party construction firm participating in MTA's Small Business Mentoring Program (SBMP).

tool_args.label: Metro-North schedule change for Hudson, Harlem, New Haven Lines
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North will introduce an updated schedule for the Hudson, Harlem and New Haven Lines beginning Sunday, March 29, 2026.

payload.description: Metro-North will introduce an updated schedule for the Hudson, Harlem and New Haven Lines

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Women's History Month Panel at Metro-North
tool_args.raw_text: In recognition of Women's History Month, Metro-North hosted a panel on Monday, March 16. Yvonne Hill-Donald, our Chief Administrative Officer, moderated the event...panel members included Grace Coleman...Jacqueline Everson...Robyn Hollander...and Karen Tuttle.

payload.description: Metro-North hosted a panel in recognition of Women's History Month. Moderated by Yvonne Hill-Donald, Chief Administrative Officer. Panelists included Grace Coleman, Jacqueline Everson, Robyn Hollander, and Karen Tuttle.

tool_args.label: Connect with Us session at Grand Central Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: The March 4th session in Grand Central was an informative experience for railroad leaders and customers alike.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad leadership was out in Grand Central Terminal for a Connect with Us session

tool_args.label: Blizzard event February 24 on LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: The most significant event occurred on February 24th when there was snow and ice conditions system wide. The event caused 116 late trains, delayed our customers an average of 13 minutes and reduced our monthly OTP by less than one percent. service was suspended on 2/23 due to the historic snowstorm Hernando

payload.description: Snow and ice conditions system wide. Caused 116 late trains, delayed customers an average of 13 minutes and reduced monthly OTP by less than one percent. Worst blizzard on record to hit Long Island.

tool_args.label: Customer Safety and Suicide Prevention Awareness event at Penn Station
tool_args.raw_text: On March 12th, an event was held at Penn Station highlighting Customer Safety and Suicide Prevention Awareness.

payload.description: An event held at Penn Station highlighting Customer Safety and Suicide Prevention Awareness

tool_args.label: Emergency response training at Metro-North's Stamford Yard
tool_args.raw_text: Earlier this year at Metro-North's Stamford Yard, employees supported emergency response training with MTAPD's Emergency Services Unit and the Southwest Regional Emergency Response Team.

payload.description: Employees supported emergency response training with MTAPD's Emergency Services Unit and the Southwest Regional Emergency Response Team at Metro-North's Stamford Yard. Tactical exercises using railroad equipment, including M8 rail cars.

tool_args.label: LIRR first commuter railroad in US to earn StormReady designation
tool_args.raw_text: the Long Island Rail Road is now the first commuter railroad in the U.S. to earn the StormReady designation from the National Weather Service

payload.claim_text: The Long Island Rail Road is now the first commuter railroad in the U.S. to earn the StormReady designation from the National Weather Service
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: LIRR non-commutation ridership exceeded pre-pandemic levels
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation ridership with 3.2 million customers decreased 1.9% below 2025, mainly due to unfavorable weather...Despite this decline, Non-Commutation exceeded pre-pandemic levels, reaching 120.2% of 2019 ridership.

payload.claim_text: Non-Commutation ridership exceeded pre-pandemic levels, reaching 120.2% of 2019 ridership
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Metro-North schedule adjustments for infrastructure projects
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North is updating schedules on the Hudson, Harlem, and New Haven Lines to improve reliability and support ongoing infrastructure work, including major switch replacements, track and tie renewals, and the Park Avenue Viaduct, 3 Bronx Station Rehabilitation, and Walk Bridge projects.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is updating schedules on the Hudson, Harlem, and New Haven Lines to improve reliability and support ongoing infrastructure work, including major switch replacements, track and tie renewals, and the Park Avenue Viaduct, 3 Bronx Station Rehabilitation, and Walk Bridge projects.

tool_args.label: LIRR April weekend service adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR will have some temporary service adjustments on various weekends in April to support switch maintenance near Far Rockaway, track maintenance between Valley Stream and Far Rockaway, and Valley Stream and West Hempstead, a bridge rehabilitation near Douglaston, a crossing renewal near Brentwood, and signal testing in Queens Interlocking.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvements Program
tool_args.raw_text: As part of the larger JCI initiative, this work will expand capacity through Jamaica, modernize infrastructure, reduce travel times through Jamaica, and bring the entire complex to a State of Good Repair.
